feature: Search by Name for Tasks, Employees, and Projects

types.SearchQuery: Search query interface with query and entityType properties
types.SearchFilters: Search filters interface with optional name, status, projectId, assignedTo
types.SearchResult: Generic search result interface for type-safe responses

shared_to_backend.data_shape: SearchFilters object with optional name field
shared_to_backend.search_logic: Server-side filtering using Supabase ilike for case-insensitive search

shared_to_frontend.state_management: React useState with useDeferredValue for performance

frontend_to_backend.response_shape: Array of entities matching search criteria

search_performance.debouncing: 300ms debounce delay to reduce API calls
search_performance.deferred_value: Use React useDeferredValue for responsive typing
search_performance.server_side: All filtering done server-side via Supabase queries

api_design.case_insensitive: Use Supabase ilike for case-insensitive matching
api_design.backward_compatible: Search parameter is optional, maintains existing API behavior

react_patterns.state_management: useState for immediate input, useDeferredValue for search
react_patterns.performance: Debounce search input to avoid excessive re-renders
react_patterns.accessibility: ARIA labels for search input, keyboard navigation

css_styling.custom_css: Use app/styles/ for all styling (no Tailwind)

files_to_modify: app/api/employees/route.ts - Add name query parameter to EmployeeQuerySchema
app/api/projects/route.ts - Add name query parameter to ProjectQuerySchema
app/api/tasks/route.ts - Add name query parameter to TaskQuerySchema
lib/utils/database.ts - Add ilike filter support for name search
lib/services/employeeService.ts - No changes needed (already accepts filters)
lib/services/projectService.ts - No changes needed (already accepts filters)
lib/services/taskService.ts - No changes needed (already accepts filters)
types/index.ts - Add SearchQuery, SearchFilters, SearchResult types
files_to_create: lib/utils/search.ts - Search utility functions (debounce, filterByName, buildSearchFilters)
app/components/SearchBar/SearchBar.tsx - Search input component with debouncing
css_best_practices: Use custom CSS classes from app/styles/ (no Tailwind)
Implement responsive design with media queries
Add smooth transitions for search results
Ensure clear focus states for accessibility
